parent_feedback:
v1 harness scored 52/70 (FAIL). Three critical gaps must be addressed in v2:

1. MEMORY PERSISTENCE (3/10): SessionStart and SessionStop hooks are completely absent. There is no mechanism to persist context between sessions — last working files, failed tests, architecture decisions, and project state are all lost on session end. v2 MUST add: (a) a SessionStart hook that loads session memory from a .claude/memory/ directory (recent files, open issues, last test results), (b) a SessionStop hook that serializes current session state (modified files, test outcomes, decisions made) to the same directory, (c) a memory schema in CLAUDE.md referencing the persistence mechanism.

2. EVAL COVERAGE (2/10): No eval-harness skill exists. The M6 validator logic lives inside harness-maker SKILL.md but was never extracted into a standalone eval skill. v2 MUST add: (a) an eval-harness skill that can score the harness automatically against the 7-category rubric, (b) smoke tests that verify file integrity (all referenced agents/skills exist, JSON is valid, hooks are wired), (c) regression detection — compare current score against parent_audit scores and flag any category that dropped.

3. COST EFFICIENCY (7/10): All 5 agents specify model: sonnet, but skills have no model field at all, meaning they may run on the default (potentially opus) model. Simple read/lint/format tasks should route to haiku. v2 MUST add: (a) model routing rules in CLAUDE.md (haiku for read-only/lint/format, sonnet for implementation/review, opus only for architecture/planning), (b) model fields in skill SKILL.md frontmatter where applicable.

Additional issues to fix:
- CLAUDE.md references 'planner' agent but agents/planner.md does not exist. Either create it or remove the reference and rely on the global planner skill.
- CLAUDE.md references 'security-reviewer' but the actual agent is named 'firebase-security-agent'. Fix the naming mismatch.
- tool_coverage: add dart devtools, firebase functions:shell, firebase functions:log to allowed commands.
- quality_gates: add integration test automation and golden test workflow.
- security_guardrails: add semgrep SAST scanning and dart pub outdated --dependency-overrides for dependency audit.
